phase_notes.plan: Implement M5-003 only: POST /agent-packages/{agent_package_id}/playground-runs runs local deterministic router inference from the AgentPackage contract, verifies router_output JSON, reports fallback decisions without auto-calling fallback, and records audit metadata without raw credentials or raw prompt text.
phase_notes.audit: Read WORKING, M5 handoff, IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE M5-003, OpenAPI PlaygroundRun schemas, router input/output schemas, existing AgentPackage routes, verifier service, credential model/service, and audit model references.
phase_notes.build: Implemented pure runtime router inference, Playground API DTOs, FastAPI route registration, service wrapper with AgentPackage + ModelRun adapter metadata loading, verifier reuse, fallback credential gate, audit event writes, and focused playground tests.
phase_notes.check: Passed task JSON, py_compile, focused playground pytest, verifier regression pytest, import boundary, file-size hard-limit, corepack pnpm e2e, unstaged diff whitespace, and staged diff whitespace checks.
phase_notes.done: Implementation committed as 269a63a; WORKING closeout prepared for push with this contract.

pabcd.approved_scope: M5-003 playground endpoint, local inference core, audit coverage, focused tests, review artifacts, and WORKING closeout within listed files.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No DB schema/model/migration, Local Daemon /agents/{agent_id}/run route, export/runtime template, training, dataset, benchmark report, FE, or docs spec/foundation edits.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification passes, stage, commit, and push this phase.
pabcd.done: M5-003 verified, implementation committed as 269a63a, and closeout prepared for push.
